name: Destroyer
notes: Kraken Point Shipyard's heavier warship. Deliberately NOT just a stronger Gunboat: Gunboat stays the fast, cheap, always-relevant early pick (speed 2.2, cost food20/steel15), while Destroyer trades speed for power — slower (1.5), pricier (food30/steel55), tankier (220 vs 130 HP), and specializes with bonuses vs. Land (1.4x) and Structure (1.2x), a bombardment/shore-support role rather than a straight upgrade or a dedicated anti-ship counter (that's Submarine's job — canTarget: Naval only).
